Accessibility Checker for Developers, Testers, and Designers in Chrome

★Digital accessibility testing right in your browser:
The Axe DevTools Extension is an automated accessibility testing tool that helps you find and fix accessibility issues early in web development right in your Chrome browser. It helps ensure your team gets fast, accurate, actionable results so you can save time on costly reworks, and create digital experiences that are compliant and work for everyone.

★Leverage the global standard in automated web accessibility testing:
The free version of the Axe DevTools Extension gives you the tools to conduct page-by-page, automated accessibility testing—all run on Axe-core, the global standard in automated web accessibility testing.

With the free browser extension, teams get a useful introduction to accessibility and a quick, automated way to catch defects, all while benefiting from the same reliable and consistent results trusted by industry leaders around the world. 

★Find and fix even more accessibility issues with AI and automated testing:
Upgrade to the pro version of the Axe DevTools Extension to move faster, smarter, and further streamline workflows with AI-enhanced features, intelligent guided testing, component-level checks, the ability to test entire user flows, central administration, deduplicated results, Jira integration, and more.

Dev teams can use this pro version of the browser extension to fix a majority of issues before production by combining traditional test automation with AI, reducing remediation costs and saving time. It’s great for teams who want to check specific pages, groups of pages, or workflows for accessibility issues.

To learn more about the Axe DevTools Extension visit https://www.deque.com/axe/devtools/extension 

Use of this extension is governed by this license agreement https://www.deque.com/terms-of-use/axe-ext/ and the privacy policy linked under the developer information

Data collection information can be found here: https://docs.deque.com/devtools-server/4.0.0/en/data-collection#axe-devtools-browser-extension-free
Upgrading to the Axe DevTools Extension pro plan gives you more control over what data is collected.
Web to Figma extension to capture pages and components and import them into Figma as editable designs. No more screenshots.

How it works

Web to Figma lets you import full webpages using the plugin, or import specific components from a website, using our Chrome Extension. Convert any HTML to design file in Figma.


Import components or webpages using the Chrome Extension:

1. Download the Web to Figma Chrome Extension
2. Go to any page in your Chrome Browser
3. Invoke the extension, and then choose if you want to capture the entire page or a single component
4. Once the extension captures the page, save the page/component to a Collection
5. Go to Figma and run the plugin
6. Go to the Collections tab of the plugin
7. Find your latest capture and click on Add to Figma


Import webpages using the plugin:

1. Install the plugin
2. From within any file, run the plugin by going to Plugins menu and selecting Web to Figma
3. In the Import tab of the plugin, enter the URL of the webpage that you want to import. For example, https://github.com/home
4. Choose the relevant settings
5. Click on Import


Benefits

1. Create a library of design inspirations using Collections
2. Create a moodboard 
3. Collaborate with developers by importing their implementation and comparing against the reference design
4. Learn how some of the more complex websites have been structured
5. Quickly explore various design patterns when solving a new task

Measure, visualize, and debug Core Web Vitals in real time. CrUX history, LCP/CLS/INP breakdowns and performance experiments

Core Web Vitals Visualizer
Open the popup on any page. See your LCP, CLS, INP, FCP, and TTFB scores instantly, color-coded, live. No separate tool. No copy-pasting URLs into PageSpeed Insights.

What it shows
Real-time scores powered by the web-vitals library, the same library Chrome uses internally. Green means good. Orange means work to do. Red means it's hurting you.

LCP - Green overlay marks the LCP element on the page. Full timing breakdown: TTFB, Resource Load Delay, Resource Load Duration, Element Render Delay. For images: preload status, fetchpriority, 1st vs 3rd party origin, natural vs rendered dimensions, estimated preload savings.

CLS - Pink overlays mark every layout shift source. Click any shift to see an animated before/after replay. Attribution shows the largest shift target and score.

INP - Broken down into Input Delay, Processing Duration, and Presentation Delay. Shows interaction type, target element, and page load state at time of interaction.

FCP and TTFB - -FCP splits into Time to First Byte vs First Byte to FCP. TTFB splits into Cache, DNS, Connection, Request, and Waiting.

CrUX history 
25 weeks of Chrome User Experience Report data for any site or URL. Toggle between P75 scores and good/needs-improvement/poor distributions. Switch between mobile and desktop. Trend lines show whether each metric is moving in the right direction.

Render-blocking resources
Every render-blocking stylesheet and script listed with individual file timings and total blocking duration.

Performance experiments
Test fixes without touching your code. Disable JS, defer all JS, or block third-party JS. Lazy load images, de-prioritize background images, disable web fonts or third-party CSS. Run any experiment with cache cleared to measure real cold-load impact.

Network throttling
Simulate slow 3G with CPU throttling. Clear cache and reload to measure cold performance.
Built for developers

Minimal permissions. No data collection. Everything runs locally. All vitals logged to the console for debugging.

One-click links to CrUX Dashboard, PageSpeed Insights, and the W3C HTML Validator for the current page.

OpenRPA is the first completely free, open source, enterprise grade Robotic Process Automation platform.
This plugin is needed in order to automate chrome with OpenRPA, the addon does nothing without a running instance of OpenRPA running at the same time.
The addon needs very broad permissions in order to record and replay sequences.
This addon does not collect and send any information, you can how ever collect information from webpages using the OpenRPA software.
For more info and free download visit out site, or forge us on github and help contribute.
Breeze Ads: Friendly Adblock for Youtube™
Let's make peace with ads, we loved ad :)

Since 2024/7 update, the detection mechanism has added some ads that can't be skipped too quickly. Although all the details haven't been fully figured out, this version is still working quite well at the moment. 🤟

======

A fast, lightweight, and undetectable YouTube Ads Blocker for Chrome.

This extension is designed to monitor and automatically skip advertisements on YouTube and YouTube Music.

FEATURES:
- [x] Skippable ad at the video's start, midway, or at the end.
- [x] Ads visible on the contents.
- [x] Support youtube music.
- [x] Skip disable plugin waring.
- [x] Only hide e-commerce ad on video.
- [x] Darken the ads in the video a bit.

Install now and enjoy YouTube and YouTube Music the way it was meant to be—ad-free!

It just a side project, and it also open source 
https://github.com/tianci-sh/BreezeAds

Enjoy it :)

Amazonインボイスダウンローダー

AmazonBusinessには対応しておりません。AmazonBuisinessはAmazonBuisinessが提供するCSVダウンロードなどを利用ください。

2024.02.08 追加
取得結果画面にCSVダウンロード機能をβ版として設置しました。…

AmazonBusinessには対応しておりません。AmazonBuisinessはAmazonBuisinessが提供するCSVダウンロードなどを利用ください。

2024.02.08 追加
取得結果画面にCSVダウンロード機能をβ版として設置しました。
取得する項目は以下です。 

EC名、注文日、注文番号、商品名(ASIN)※、合計金額、適格番号/支払い明細、ファイル名
※最大5件まで、商品ごとに「::」で区切られます

2024.01.31追加
PDF取得時、年月ごとにPDFにまとめZIPでダウンロードするオプションを設けました。

2024.01.26追加
アマゾンアカウントの収集はしておりません。
複数のアマゾンアカウントを切り替えてデータ取得された場合、アマゾンアカウントと購入履歴の紐づけを行っていないため、全ての履歴が混ざって表示される仕様でございます。ご了承ください。

2024.01.22追加
拡張機能のアイコンクリックし「amazonの取得履歴ページを開くボタン」押下で履歴ページに遷移後、履歴ぺージから最大5件PDFを1つのPDFにまとめて出力する機能を追加しました。

インボイスに伴い、Amazonの注文履歴ページに表示されている注文商品の適格請求書か支払い明細のPDFを一括ダウンロードします。
年単位での指定も可能ですが、履歴数が多い場合は「年単位のデータ取得」と「ダウンロード各々」に時間が結構かかります。

一括ダウンロード後、取得結果画面にて注文番号ごとに取得したPDFが「適格請求書（インボイス対応）」か「支払い明細（インボイス非対応）」かどうかを一覧で確認できます。同時にPDFの再ダウンロードも可能です。
取得したPDFが「支払い明細」であった場合、販売者へ注文番号ベースでAmazonのチャット問い合わせリンクとAmazon上の販売者ページのリンクを自動生成します。

なお、現状において特にデジタルコンテンツに多いですが注文内にインボイス対応と非対応の購入が混在した場合は、適格請求書として判定してしまうため予めご了承ください。

最後に、Amazonの仕様変更により突然利用できなくなることもありますので、その際はご了承のほどよろしくお願い致します。

Amazon
適格請求書

Easily transform any web page’s HTML into a ready-to-use Elementor design. This extension lets you select elements directly from a webpage and quickly convert them into clean, customizable Elementor data. Perfect for web designers, developers, and WordPress users who want to save time re-creating designs in Elementor.

Key Features:

- Select and capture HTML from any webpage
- Automatically generate Elementor widget code
- Copy and paste directly into your WordPress Elementor editor
- Preserve structure and styling for faster workflows
- Lightweight and easy to use

Streamline your design process by turning any webpage into reusable Elementor components in seconds.

A better Network tab: one-click filtering, better search, parsed GraphQL/JSON-RPC, readable WebSockets, Next/Nuxt state, small shareable logs.

What you get:
🔍 One-click filters — Filter by exact URL, route, or wildcard (no fragile text queries).
⛰️ Framework state — View Next.js/Nuxt state that Network can’t surface.
🎨 Protocol-aware views — JSON-RPC and GraphQL parsed and visualized.
📡 Readable WebSockets — Parsed, beautified frames for real-time inspection.
✨ Portable logs — Import/export a compact '.netlogs.zip' (skip giant HARs).
🖼️ Inline media — Images and audio render inline for quick checks.
🤝 Team-friendly — Share small logs for faster reviews and bug reports.

Where it lives:
Implemented directly in DevTools as the “📜 Net Logs” tab for Chromium-based browsers.

Source & docs: https://github.com/Artboomy/netlogs

Search in Vendict's knowledge base & autocomplete security questionnaires.

Vendict automates the completion of security questionnaire.
With this extension, you can:
1. Autocomplete online security questionnaires. 
2. Find or generate the best answer to any question out of your knowledge base 

How to autocomplete online security questionnaires:
Go to the online questionnaire page. Open the Chrome extension and go to the "Answer assessment" tab.
First scan the assessment. At this stage, all the questionnaire information is collected with the suggestions as answers.
Then you can optionally open the assessment in Vendict's platform ("Open in Vendict"). You can edit there the answers.
At the end, you can fill the questionnaire with your answers and the suggested answers via the "Autocomplete" button.

How to find an answer to any question:
Authenticate and search your question to find the best answer within your knowledge base.
Type your question:
- either directly in the search bar 
- or by highlighting a text in your current page and open the extension
You will get both a Generative AI answer and your most relevant library answers.
You can copy the answer back into your current page in the selected text area (or to the closest text area of the highlighted text).
Raintree ScribeIQ™ - AI Scribe for Rehab Therapy
Raintree ScribeIQ™ automates clinical documentation using real-time ambient transcription and a platform-native AI agent built…

Raintree ScribeIQ™ automates clinical documentation using real-time ambient transcription and a platform-native AI agent built directly into your EMR. Use the Raintree ScribeIQ™ Chrome Extension to populate occupational and physical therapy documentation with unparalleled precision and accuracy.

Efficiently Create Detailed Notes: The AI scribe automatically generates progress, treatment, and evaluation notes tailored to your organization’s standards, learning and adapting to your style with each use.

Ambient Transcription: Intelligently filter out background noise, unrelated conversations and distractions—without sacrificing quality. ScribeIQ™’s transcription model identifies therapy-specific terminology with high accuracy.

Predictive Coding: Optimize diagnosis and CPT code selection by payor. ScribeIQ™ suggests untimed and timed codes and  identifies specific interventions for billing efficiency and accuracy.

Support Compliance: ScribeIQ™ supports HIPAA compliance and is registered as a Class II medical device, upholding the highest standards of patient data security and device reliability.
—

Raintree is the rehabilitation and physical therapy software of choice for enterprise and large therapy provider organizations. Learn more: raintreeinc.com

Scrolling Screenshot tool for screen capture and screen sharing

- Full Page Screenshot Functionality
Scrollshot is equipped with an advanced full page screenshot feature, allowing users to capture entire web pages in a single click. Unlike standard screenshot tools that capture only the visible area, this feature scrolls through the page automatically, stitching together a complete image of the entire content, perfect for long articles, comprehensive reports, or detailed web pages.

- Custom Application Logic for ChatGPT (Premium Feature) 
Recognizing the dynamic and interactive nature of ChatGPT, the plugin offers specialized logic to capture the conversational flow and ensuring that the screenshots represent the full dialogue exchange.

- Premium for Free
Even free users (with or without account) can consume a limited amount of premium scrollshots.

- Secure and Privacy-Conscious Design
Privacy and security are paramount. Screenshots are generated and saved on your local machine. There is no hidden cloud upload.
我们专注于为海外商家提供全面的TikTok店铺营销服务，通过达人邀约和达人计划，为您的店铺优化推广。我们精心设计的推广话术将有效提升您的产品曝光，确保在竞争激烈的市场中脱颖而出。与我们合作，让您的海外店铺在TikTok平台上实现更广泛的品牌影响力和销售增长。

功能一览：
●  私信机器人 
  ○ 自动化发送私信，每天高达20000条，无论时间或地域，轻松提高达人邀约效率，极大节省建联成本. 📩🤖
●  定向计划机器人 
  ○ 快速批量创建定向计划，最快两小时完成10000个达人的建联，效率提升100倍（即将推出）. 🎯🤖
●  话术机器人 
  ○ 自动生成高质量私信话术，结合优质的谈判模型和GPT生成技术，显著提升达人的回复率. 💬🤖
●  操作便捷

A utility extension for testing webpages for accessibility. Reveal code and perform accessibility tests quickly.

The Equa11y extension is to help test a webpage for accessibility. It is designed to improve the efficiency of accessibility testing with various utilities.

What's New in V1.4!
Tabbing Order - Now highlights elements with a tabIndex greater than 0.
Stop Animations - Now stops animations in iframes.
Reveal Viewport Tag - Now detects if pinch to zoom is disabled.
Text Spacing - Now adjusts paragraph spacing.
Text Zoom - Stability Updates
Display Alt Text - Now reveals when the alt attribute is missing
Display Heading Levels - Now account for the use of 'aria-level' and dynamic headings that are added/removed from the page
Display Screen Reader Text - Now prioritizes aria-label, aria-labelledby, and aria-describedby attributes.
Stability Fixes

All utilities are broken into tabs by WCAG (Web Content Accessibility Guideline) principle:

Perceivable
Operable
Understandable
Robust
And includes the success criteria for each test.

Set Dark Mode
Hide the beta utilities
Change the list of exclusive words
Increase the font size of the extension

Core Utilities
Display Alt Text - Outlines and labels images with their alternative text.
Display Landmark Regions - Outlines and labels landmark regions with there role and label.
Display Element Roles - Outlines and labels interactive elements with their role.
Display Heading Levels - Outlines and labels all headings on the page.
Reveal Viewport Tag - Displays the viewport tag.
Zoom Text 200% - Zooms text-only on the page by 200%.
Display Target Size - Displays the current target size of an interactive element.
Display Screen Reader Text - Displays the hidden text that a screen reader would announce. It takes into consideration the precedence of aria-label, aria-labelledby, and aria-describedby.
Highlight Exclusive Text - Scans the page for exclusive words (e.g - "See", "View", etc) and highlights them. You can also modify the list in the NEW "settings" page.
Reveal Lang Attribute - Displays the lang attribute for the page and any in-page elements.

Beta Utilities
Outline Embedded Text - Scans all images on the page and attempts to determine if the image has embedded text. (English only)
Outline Event Listeners - Outlines and labels all non-interactive elements in the page with events. This is useful for identifying elements that may not get keyboard or screen reader focus.

Convert: Web to PDF — Save Any Webpage as PDF
Convert any webpage to PDF. Customize layout, remove elements, extract articles — all processed locally.

Convert any webpage into a clean, high-quality PDF — right from your browser. No servers. No uploads. No data collection.

Every conversion runs entirely on your device using Chrome’s built-in rendering engine, so your data never leaves your machine.

Unlike most web-to-PDF tools, this generates real PDFs — not screenshots. That means selectable text, working links, proper formatting, and consistent layout across pages.

---

🚀 WHY THIS IS DIFFERENT

Most extensions fall into one of three traps:
• They generate low-quality, screenshot-based PDFs  
• They send your page data to external servers  
• They hide basic features behind a paywall  

Convert: Web to PDF avoids all three.

You get fast, high-fidelity PDFs with full control — completely free and fully local.

---

⚙️ CONVERT & CUSTOMIZE

• One-click conversion — click the icon or press Ctrl+Shift+P  
• 7 page sizes — A3, A4, A5, Letter, Legal, Tabloid, Ledger  
• Portrait or Landscape orientation  
• Adjustable margins — None, Minimal, Normal, Wide  
• Scale from 25% to 200%  
• Include or exclude background graphics  
• Optional headers & footers (title, URL, page numbers)  

---

🧹 CLEAN UP BEFORE YOU CONVERT

• Remove Elements — click anything to remove ads, popups, or clutter  
• Undo changes instantly (Ctrl+Z)  
• Article Mode — extract only the main content (no navigation, no noise)  
• Hide Sticky Elements — remove floating headers and banners  
• Load All Images — ensures lazy-loaded images appear in your PDF  

---

👀 PREVIEW BEFORE YOU SAVE

• Full PDF preview before download  
• Print directly from preview  
• Share without downloading  
• See file size before saving  

---

⚡ BUILT FOR SPEED

• Right-click → Convert page, selection, or link  
• Keyboard shortcuts:  
  - Ctrl+Shift+P → Convert page  
  - Ctrl+Shift+S → Article mode  

---

🔒 YOUR DATA STAYS ON YOUR DEVICE

Everything runs locally using Chrome DevTools Protocol.

No servers. No tracking. No analytics. No account required.

This matters — many popular tools send your page content to external servers. If you're converting sensitive data (financial reports, internal dashboards, legal documents), local processing isn’t optional. It’s essential.

---

👥 WHO THIS IS FOR

• Students saving research and notes  
• Professionals exporting reports and dashboards  
• Legal teams preserving web evidence  
• Researchers archiving papers  
• Journalists saving pages before they change  
• Anyone who wants clean PDFs without paying monthly  

---

💸 FREE. NO PAYWALL. NO ADS.

Every feature is included. No premium tier. No limits.

Convert unlimited pages with full customization — completely free.
Export and download Google NotebookLM notes and chat to PDF.
By using this extension, you can easily export your notes to PDF. Also it is free of charge!
Simulates mouse and keyboard events on specified pages

Simple Simulator is designed for simulating mouse and keyboard events on web pages, facilitating the testing and automation of user interactions for beginners. It enables developers and QA professionals to automate clicks and key presses, thus streamlining the testing process. The extension offers basic scripting and website whitelisting, as well as messaging passing with whitelisted extensions. It supports precise control over event timing and sequence, making it suitable for testing dynamic and interactive web applications.
Capture screenshots of the current page at common responsive breakpoints (optionally full-page).

LaQta — Pixel-perfect screenshots for responsive websites

LaQta captures exceptionally sharp, pixel-perfect screenshots of any webpage in seconds. Whether you’re grabbing real responsive breakpoints, full-page layouts, or a single section, every capture is clean, accurate, and ready to use—no resizing, scrolling, or stitching required.

Unlike most screenshot extensions, LaQta is built with image quality first. It understands modern, responsive websites and handles viewport changes, long-page scrolling, sticky headers, and high-DPI rendering automatically—so what you capture looks exactly the way it should. You focus on the design; LaQta delivers the screenshot.

Whether you’re a designer, developer, QA engineer, marketer, or anyone who needs clean visuals for docs and presentations, LaQta delivers consistent, professional screenshots every time.

Key features

** Capture types

- Responsive breakpoint screenshots (desktop, tablet, mobile) in one click
- Full-page screenshots with automatic scrolling and stitching
- Viewport screenshots of exactly what’s on screen
- Element screenshots — click any card, section, hero, nav, or component
- Region screenshots — draw a box around precisely what you want
- Capture the same section across all breakpoints automatically

Export & quality

- High-quality and high-DPI image presets
- PNG or JPEG export
- Custom filename prefixes and capture delays
- Convenience
- Optional keyboard shortcut for instant region capture
- Dark / light popup theme with preference memory

Perfect for
- Frontend developers documenting responsive behavior and regressions
- UI/UX designers capturing layouts, components, and design states
- QA teams creating clear, consistent bug reports
- Marketers & content creators grabbing polished visuals for slides, decks, and pages

How it works

1.Open any webpage.
2.Click the LaQta icon in your toolbar.
3.Choose a capture mode: viewport, full page, element, region, or breakpoints.
4.(Optional) Adjust quality, format, delay, or breakpoints.
5.Hit capture—LaQta resizes, scrolls, and downloads your screenshots automatically.

LaQta is built to feel fast, reliable, and a little delightful—with clear labels, sensible defaults, and just enough power for people who care about great screenshots every day.
